name: Spencer Tracy
abstract: Spencer Bonaventure Tracy (April 5, 1900 – June 10, 1967) was an American actor. He was known for his natural performing style and versatility.

about_quotes.speaker: Hentoff Nat
about_quotes.evidence: if you’re lucky, you might see on late night television The Last Hurrah with Spencer Tracy. That is about as accurate as you can get the personification of Curley.
